message:
🐛 Fix ArgoCD cards showing empty in live mode (#794)

ArgoCD cards are in DEMO_DATA_CARDS (no real API integration), so they
should always show mock data regardless of demo mode. Previously the
hooks gated mock data behind demoMode check, causing empty state in
live mode despite the "Demo" badge showing.

Removed demoMode gating from useArgoCDApplications, useArgoCDHealth,
and useArgoCDSyncStatus since these cards always use mock data.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
